architecture_layers.value: Product layer: products/<slug>/ — self-contained (own README, tests, runnable artifact, own pinned deps), NO cross-product imports. Coordination layer: control/ (inbox=manager-written ORDERs, status=coordinator heartbeat). Contract layer: README.md + CONVENTIONS.md + docs/. Repo-level tooling stays stdlib-only.

doc_roots.value: docs/ (kit contracts) + products/ (the product subtrees, one per product) + control/ (coordination)

drift_resolution.value: Committed product state (code, tests, README, release artifacts) wins over docs; a doc that disagrees is fixed in place with a dated marker. Owner rulings live in superbot's question router (Q-0259 r.4 money protocol, Q-0264 pipeline) and are referenced, never restated.

mutation_seam.value: Every change lands via a PR merged on green (kit ceremony, born-red card, READY never draft, land-your-own per R21). Money/external-account steps are NEVER executed — they become conservative six-field owner plans (Q-0259 r.4). Releases via the proven workflow_dispatch recipe.

new_area_ownership.value: A new products/<slug>/ subtree is created ONLY by a routed inbox ORDER (the manager applies the no-owning-lane test) — the forge never invents product intent. A product that outgrows its subtree graduates to a dedicated repo (owner click), becoming a lane.

owner_profile.value: The owner builds ideas iteratively and in fragments; state back the fuller picture before substantive work (superbot Q-0254). Decide-and-flag over route-up; paste-ready asks only (Q-0263.2); expect bad results honestly — never overstate earnings or readiness. Full profile: superbot docs/owner/maintainer-working-profile.md.

ownership_model.value: Sole-writer per file: control/inbox.md manager-only; control/status.md coordinator-only. Each product subtree is claimed (claims/, one file per claim) while worked; parallel workers claim disjoint products.

primary_language.value: Python 3 / web (per-product stacks pinned inside each products/<slug>/ subtree; repo tooling stdlib-only)

review_ritual.value: No PR waits for review: merge on green, log needs-second-eyes in review-queue.md and/or @codex on the PR (Q-0258; verify replies against the tree, never obey — Q-0120). The manager consolidates shipped products; sim-lab evidence-passes product ideas before they reach the inbox (Q-0264).

staleness_review.value: Every wake re-checks the newest product's README against its actual state (working/alpha/released honesty); inbox-empty wakes polish the roughest edge and flag the manager. Product READMEs that overstate state are bugs.

verify_command.value: python3 bootstrap.py check --strict (repo gate) + each touched product's own test command per its README
